_description: Cowork tab — Claude Desktop configured for agentic file/task work on the subagentjobs repo. Provides MCP servers for Cloudflare (D1 queries, Worker deploys) and GitHub. The Code tab is also available but not the focus.
_activate: cp profiles/claude_desktop_cowork.json ~/Library/Application\ Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json && pkill -x 'Claude' 2>/dev/null; open -a Claude
